items.title: Funeral held for baby shot dead by Israeli troops in occupied West Bank
items.dek: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.
items.body: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.

items.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over 'invasion' of migrants on its beaches in D-Day speech
items.dek: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.
items.body: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.
